query:
-- 1. Check what the pricebook has for UCXcel Webex Basic
SELECT id, product_name, sheet_name, partner_buy_price, partner_sell_price, version_id
FROM sasboss_pricebook_items
WHERE LOWER(product_name) LIKE '%ucxcel webex basic%'
ORDER BY version_id DESC;

-- 2. Check current cost of UCXcel Webex Basic services in the DB
SELECT s.externalId, s.planName, s.monthlyCost, s.monthlyRevenue, s.billingPlatform, s.costSource
FROM services s
WHERE LOWER(s.planName) LIKE '%ucxcel webex basic%'
  AND s.status != 'terminated'
LIMIT 10;

-- 1. Check what the pricebook has for UCXcel Webex Basic
SELECT id, product_name, sheet_name, partner_buy_price, partner_sell_price, version_id
FROM sasboss_pricebook_items
WHERE LOWER(product_name) LIKE '%ucxcel webex basic%'
ORDER BY version_id DESC;

-- 2. Check current cost of UCXcel Webex Basic services in the DB
SELECT s.externalId, s.planName, s.monthlyCost, s.monthlyRevenue, s.billingPlatform, s.costSource
FROM services s
WHERE LOWER(s.planName) LIKE '%ucxcel webex basic%'
  AND s.status != 'terminated'
LIMIT 10;
